description_long: This megaphone features a striking geometric design with several angular blue panels forming the main body, and a prominent green flared section at the top, likely serving as the sound projection horn. The structure is supported by a long, thin red rod that extends vertically through a black circular base, suggesting it can be mounted or held upright. A yellow rod protrudes horizontally from the side, possibly functioning as a handle or support. The blue panels are arranged in a fan-like configuration, giving the object a modern, abstract appearance. The materials appear to be primarily plastic or metal, with a matte finish and solid construction. No visible branding, speaker grill, or activation button is apparent from any angle.
description: A modern, angular megaphone with blue and green panels, a red support rod, and a black circular base, featuring a bold geometric design.
description_view_0: The blue fan-like panels and the green horn are most visible, with the yellow rod extending to the left.
description_view_1: The green horn dominates the view, with the blue panels partially obscured and the yellow rod visible on the right.
description_view_2: The blue panels are seen from a different angle, with the yellow rod pointing outward and the green horn above.
description_view_3: The green horn is prominent, with the blue panels and yellow rod visible at an angle, and the black base below.
attribute_mouthpiece_design: The mouthpiece is not distinctly visible; the lower end of the blue panel cluster may serve as the mouthpiece, appearing angular and integrated into the body.
